summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
raw_articles.summary: Demis Hassabis thinks the world needs an AI watchdog with the power to hit the brakes if frontier models become too dangerous. Writing in a blog post, the Google DeepMind CEO and cofounder said the US should lead the initiative, arguing that the country is the best place to set global standards "given its economic […]

raw_articles.title: 9 Tips to Get More Out of Google Chat
raw_articles.summary: There’s more to Google’s messaging app than you might realize.

raw_articles.title: Oura Ring 5 Review: Still the Smart Ring to Beat
raw_articles.summary: It’s not the upgrade Ring 4 owners have been waiting for, but it’s easily the best smart ring Oura has ever made.

raw_articles.title: SEO is not dead: 5 ways to win more citations from AI search
raw_articles.summary: Now that AI chat is becoming the new status quo of search engines, the rules for staying visible have changed for small businesses and solopreneurs.

raw_articles.title: The Chatbot That Foretold Why People Share Secrets With ChatGPT
raw_articles.summary: In the 1960s an MIT professor named Joseph Weizenbaum created a chatbot called ELIZA. The conversations people had with it set precedents for the chatbots to come.

raw_articles.title: Sotheby’s Big T. Rex Auction Raises Concerns Hype and Wealth Are Upending Science
raw_articles.summary: Private buyers are increasingly outbidding museums for fossils. That’s making it difficult—or even impossible—for researchers to improve our understanding of the past.

raw_articles.title: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
raw_articles.summary: New hyperscale data centers can't set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation's first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature. The order blocks new environmental permits for data […]

raw_articles.title: DOGE Used AI for Housing Policy. The Government Won’t Say How
raw_articles.summary: In response to a public records request, HUD has withheld documents about DOGE’s use of AI—in part by citing a privilege that doesn’t exist.

raw_articles.title: Evolutionary Data Through Schemaboi: Achieving Forward, Backwards, and Sideways Compatibility
raw_articles.summary: Drawing from the enduring adaptability of HTML and HTTP,  Seph Gentle proposes embedding self-contained schemas directly into file headers, ensuring data remains readable without external definitions. His experimental format prioritises forward, backwards, and sideways compatibility, enabling data format evolution without central coordination or data loss By Olimpiu Pop

raw_articles.title: PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light
raw_articles.summary: The machine that could change the world will be housed in a room that looks like a data center crossed with an ice cream factory. Inside will be some 100 stainless-steel cabinets, each about six feet tall and connected to a supply of liquid helium that keeps them only a few degrees above absolute zero.…

raw_articles.title: Taiwan's second-largest chipmaker starts mass production in Singapore; Citi sees improving outlook
raw_articles.summary: Taiwan’s UMC has kicked off mass production of silicon photonics wafers at its Singapore facility amid positive Citi forecast.

raw_articles.title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
raw_articles.summary: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.

raw_articles.title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be ‘everything for everyone’
raw_articles.summary: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.

raw_articles.title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
raw_articles.summary: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.

raw_articles.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
raw_articles.summary: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.
